title: Lab 11: Time Synchronization
description: Configure servervm as a simple chrony source and point clientvm at it.

tasks: On servervm, configure chronyd so it serves time to the 192.168.122.0/24 lab network and starts automatically at boot.
On clientvm, configure chronyd so it synchronizes only with servervm and starts automatically at boot.
hints: servervm needs an allow rule before it can serve the lab subnet.
clientvm should use a single server line for this lab.
checks: systemctl is-enabled chronyd | grep -qx enabled && grep -Rqs '^server servervm iburst$' /etc/chrony.d /etc/chrony.conf
ssh admin@servervm sudo systemctl is-enabled chronyd | grep -qx enabled && ssh admin@servervm sudo grep -Rqs '^allow 192.168.122.0/24$' /etc/chrony.d /etc/chrony.conf
solution_outline: Update chrony on servervm with an allow rule and enable the service.
Point clientvm to servervm only and enable the service there too.
task_titles: Configure servervm as the chrony source
Configure clientvm to use only servervm for time
